name: ac2
description: AC2 plugin for Codex — pair an AC2 wallet over Liquid Auth (FIDO2 + WebRTC) for signing, verification, remote approval, and x402 payments.

interface.shortDescription: Pair Codex with an AC2 wallet for signing and paid HTTP calls.
interface.longDescription: AC2 connects Codex to a user-controlled wallet over Liquid Auth and WebRTC. It provides wallet pairing, two-way chat transport, cryptographic signing and verification, capability discovery, remote approval relay, and x402 paid HTTP resource access without exposing private keys to the agent.
defaultPrompt: Sign this message with my wallet.
